notableEvents.label: Will Benson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Benson flies out to center fielder Jackson Merrill.

notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday GIDP
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to shortstop Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Ty France. Matt McLain out at 2nd. JJ Bleday out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. homers (2) on a line drive to left field.
